underlying_goal: Summarize the dlp-oncall Slack channel using Claude Code's Slack integration
friction_detail: Claude initially tried adding mcpServers to settings.json which wasn't valid, then had to switch to .mcp.json, and ultimately couldn't complete the original task within the session.
brief_summary: User wanted to summarize a Slack channel but the MCP server wasn't configured; Claude set up the config but the user had to restart to complete the task.
